channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pantami Rejects Gwamna as APC Consensus Candidate for Gombe Governorship
item.description: Professor Isa Ali Pantami, one of the aspirants for the All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship ticket in Gombe State, has rejected the party's endorsement of Jamilu Isyaku Gwamna as its consensu...

item.title: Yankees send Anthony Volpe to Triple-A as Jose Caballero solidifies shortstop role
item.description: The New York Yankees have made a roster adjustment at the shortstop position following the end of Anthony Volpe's rehab assignment. Volpe, recovering from left shoulder surgery, hit .250 across 13 gam...

item.title: Man United Beat Liverpool 3-2 Thanks to Mainoo's Late Goal
item.description: Manchester United don boost their chances for Champions League spot after dem beat Liverpool 3-2 for Old Trafford on Sunday. The match start sharply as Matheus Cunha score inside six minutes to put Un...

item.title: Counting begins for Tamil Nadu Assembly elections amid three-cornered contest involving DMK, AIADMK and TVK
item.description: Counting of votes for the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections commenced on May 4, following a single-phase polling held on April 23 across all 234 constituencies. The election recorded a high voter tur...

item.title: Rakesh Bedi Reflects on His Career and Newfound Recognition Through ‘Dhurandhar’
item.description: Rakesh Bedi, veteran actor of Indian cinema, television, and theatre, has received renewed attention following the success of Aditya Dhar's ‘Dhurandhar’ movies. Known for his memorable catchphrase “Ba...

item.title: BBC increases Celebrity Traitors budget for second series to accommodate A-list participants
item.description: The BBC has reportedly doubled the £1 million budget for the second series of Celebrity Traitors, making it the most star-studded edition to date. The expanded budget reflects the high-profile nature ...

item.title: Malinauskas’ LIV Golf Venture Faces Collapse Amid Growing Controversy
item.description: South Australian Premier Peter Malinauskas' much-hyped LIV Golf event, which he championed amid significant criticism regarding its reputational, financial, and civic impacts, is now on the brink of c...

item.title: Spirit Airlines Shuts Down Amid Financial Struggles and Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: Spirit Airlines ceased operations on Saturday, citing skyrocketing fuel prices influenced by geopolitical tensions, including President Trump's military actions in Iran. However, top White House econo...

item.title: The Real Problem Behind Poverty in the Philippines: It's Not the Poor
item.description: In the Philippines, the ongoing struggles of the poor are often blamed on the wrong causes. Amid persistent issues like low wages, job insecurity, and the uneven distribution of wealth, the poor are u...

item.title: Environmental concerns raised over proposed Hermanus beachfront restaurant
item.description: A proposed Cape Town Fish Market restaurant on Grotto Beach in Hermanus has sparked strong objections from environmentalists. Whale Coast Conservation (WCC) has raised concerns over the impact of perm...

item.title: BJP Campaign in Assam Focuses on Illegal Immigration Ahead of 2026 Polls
item.description: As Assam awaits the counting of votes from the April 9 assembly elections, the role of the 'infiltrator' or illegal immigration narrative in the BJP's campaign has been a major focus. Chief Minister H...

item.title: Beijing restaurant fully booked after Keir Starmer’s visit, introduces special menu
item.description: Keir Starmer’s visit to Beijing earlier this year has sparked a unique culinary phenomenon. The upmarket restaurant In and Out, known in Chinese as Yi Zuo Yi Wang, has been fully booked since the Brit...

item.title: FG Begins Arrangements to Evacuate Nigerians from South Africa Amid Rising Xenophobia
item.description: Di Federal Government don start plans to help Nigerians wey dey South Africa return back home as tensions dey rise against foreigners for some cities like Pretoria and Johannesburg. So far, at least 1...

item.title: 'Dutton Ranch' Trailer Released: Beth and Rip Dutton Return in Yellowstone Spinoff
item.description: Fans of the hit series 'Yellowstone' are eagerly anticipating the spinoff 'Dutton Ranch,' following the return of Beth Dutton and Rip Wheeler. The new series, premiering on Paramount+ on May 15, explo...

item.title: Victoria's tobacco licensing crackdown struggles to curb organised crime
item.description: Victoria's new tobacco licensing scheme, aimed at curbing the $8.5 billion illicit tobacco market, has encountered significant problems in its first three months. Launched on February 1 with 14 inspec...

item.title: Delhi introduces fully digital traffic challan system with limited court appeals
item.description: The Delhi government, led by Chief Minister Rekha Gupta, has announced plans to implement the amendments introduced by the Centre to the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989, aiming to improve traffic r...

item.title: Pantami Challenges APC’s Selection Of Gombe Governorship Candidate For 2027
item.description: Former Minister of Communication and Digital Economy, Isa Pantami, don reject the way Jamilu Gwamna dem select as APC governorship candidate for Gombe State 2027 election. Pantami, wey still wan conte...

item.title: NDTV Unable to Display Election Results Due to Access Restrictions
item.description: The requested news article on NDTV about the assembly election results in Bengal, Assam, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, and Puducherry could not be accessed due to server restrictions. Users trying to view the c...

item.title: Trump and Republicans Navigate Challenging Midterm Elections Ahead
item.description: With six months to go before the U.S. midterm elections, President Donald Trump's administration faces a pivotal moment that could reshape congressional control and influence the trajectory of his sec...

item.title: Youth Attempt to Enter Vancouver Scientology Building During Viral Social Media Trend
item.description: On Saturday afternoon, hundreds of young people gathered outside the Church of Scientology in Vancouver as part of a viral social media trend known as 'Scientology speedrunning.' The event, which took...
